name: imessage-scanner
description: Single-plugin marketplace for imessage-scanner — a Claude Code plugin that searches your local iMessage history with natural-language queries.

plugins.name: imessage-scanner
plugins.description: Scan your local iMessage history with natural-language queries via /imsg-scan. Reads ~/Library/Messages/chat.db read-only and decodes Apple's attributedBody typedstream blobs. macOS-only, no cloud, no API calls.
